calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Continued To Jun-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cynthia Lee for Bong Kuen Chu.

Ms. Lee stated that the banks rejected the 13100 Affidavits, that they were insisting on Court orders, and addressed the issues raised by the Court with regard to the schedule of assets and the additional siblings. The matter was continued to June 30, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Lee to deal with the banks and pursue her Clients rights to have the funds transferred pursuant to Probate Code 13100.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
